Metadata.title: Motzkin Store · School Equipment
Metadata.description: Order the school supply list for your child in Kiryat Motzkin.

Footer.description: Order school equipment for children attending schools in Kiryat Motzkin.
Footer.copyright: © {year} Motzkin Store · Built for the<highlight> City of Kiryat Motzkin</highlight>.

Home.headline:
Order your child's

school list, in one go.
Home.subtitle: Pick your school and your child's grade to see the equipment list, then check out in one payment.
Home.schoolHint: Start by selecting the school your child attends.
Home.gradeHint: Pick the grade your child is starting.
Home.secretariatNotice: If something on the list looks wrong, please check with the school secretariat first.

Login.title: Login
Login.intro: Sign in to access this year's equipment lists and complete your order.
Login.failed: Failed to login. Please try again.
Login.trouble: Trouble signing in? Call the municipal service centre at <phone>04-878-0900</phone> or dial <quickDial>*5470</quickDial>.

Cart.title: Your cart
Cart.emptySubtitle: Once you save a school's equipment list, it will appear here ready for checkout.
Cart.checkoutNotice: Ready to complete your order? You'll be redirected to a secure payment page.
Cart.dialogClearMessage: All saved equipment lists will be removed from your cart. This cannot be undone.
Cart.dialogRemoveMessage: “{name}” will be removed from your cart.

Checkout.title: Review & pay
Checkout.reviewIntro: Please review the lists below. Payment is handled by our secure payment provider. No card details are stored on this site.
Checkout.emptySubtitle: Your cart is empty. Add at least one equipment list before continuing.
Checkout.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

PaymentSuccess.title: Thank you. Your order is on its way.
PaymentSuccess.clearedMessage: Your payment was received and your cart has been cleared. You will receive a confirmation by email shortly.
PaymentSuccess.invalidMessage: We could not confirm your payment session, but your cart has not been touched. Please contact support if you were charged.

About.title: About Motzkin Store
About.intro: Motzkin Store is a school-supply ordering site for families in Kiryat Motzkin. Pick the school, pick the grade, and order the equipment list in one go.
About.teamHeading: Built by students of the Technion
About.teamDescription: Developed as part of the Project in Software Engineering course, in cooperation with the Kiryat Motzkin Municipality.

Contact.title: We're here to help.
Contact.subtitle: For questions about school equipment orders, payments, or technical issues, reach out to the municipality's service centre or to the developer team.
Contact.devTeamIntro: Found a bug or have a feature suggestion? Our development team handles it on GitHub.
Contact.devTeamFind: Team profiles and direct links are on the About page.
